cta.body: Register your agency and start routing every EPC, asbestos, electrical and fuel-tank check from a single dashboard.
cta.heading: Four certificates, one workflow.

hero.subtitle: We brought together the four Belgian certification practices our customers were already using — and rebuilt the paperwork around one dashboard. No more juggling three invoices and four inspectors for a single property sale.
hero.title: Four specialists, one team.

timeline.heading: How we got here

electrical2018.body: AREI-accredited electrical inspectors bring installation checks into the portfolio, making pre-sale compliance a one-stop service.
electrical2018.title: Elec Inspect comes aboard

epc2015.body: A dedicated EPC specialist with certified assessors across Flanders and Brussels merges to offer energy certificates under the same roof.
epc2015.title: EPC Partner joins

founded2011.body: The oldest of the four — started as a two-person asbestos inventory practice in Antwerp and grew into a region-wide operation.
founded2011.title: Asbest Experts founded

fuel2021.body: The last specialist — certified fuel-tank inspectors — joins, covering above-ground and buried tanks for residential and commercial clients.
fuel2021.title: Tank Check completes the team

launch2026.body: Four specialists, one brand, one platform. We open our shared dashboard to every real-estate agency in Belgium.
launch2026.title: immoplatform launches

timeline.subheading: Fifteen years of independent craft, three acquisitions, and one shared platform.

values.heading: What we believe

belgium.body: Built for the regional quirks — Flemish EPC, Brussels electrical, Walloon asbestos. Local rules, national coverage.
belgium.title: Belgium first

inspectorFriendly.body: Our freelancers get fair rates, clean scheduling and tools that actually help in the field.
inspectorFriendly.title: Inspector-friendly

oneFile.body: Every certificate, report and invoice lives in the same folder. No email threads, no spreadsheets.
oneFile.title: One file, one truth

receipts.body: Every document is retained for 10 years, indexed and exportable in one click.
receipts.title: Keep the receipts

specialists.body: Every service is delivered by a certified, accredited inspector — never a generalist.
specialists.title: Specialists only

transparent.body: Flat rates, no hidden fees, and real-time status visible to every party on the assignment.
transparent.title: Transparent by default

values.subheading: Six principles that shape the way we build, inspect and invoice.

form.heading: Send us a message
form.subheading: We reply within 4 business hours on weekdays.

hero.subtitle: Whether you're scoping a new agency account, troubleshooting a delivered file, or just curious about coverage in your province — we'll get back the same business day.
hero.title: Talk to a real human. Usually within the hour.

cta.body: Set up your agency in minutes. First assignment on us.
cta.heading: Ready to simplify your workflow?

hero.subtitle: Energy Performance Certificates, Asbestos Inventory Attests, Electrical Inspections and Fuel Tank Checks — ordered, tracked and delivered from a single dashboard. Built for real-estate agents in Belgium.
hero.title: One platform for every real-estate certificate.

howItWorks.heading: From listing to certificate, in three steps.

create.body: Add the property address, owner and tenant contacts, and any notes — just like you do today.
create.title: Create an assignment

pick.body: Tick EPC, AIV, EK or TK — one, some or all. We schedule the rest.
pick.title: Pick the services you need

register.body: Create an account for your agency. Invite your colleagues and set your branding preferences.
register.title: Register your office

merger.heading: Four specialists. One team.
merger.lead1: For years, real-estate agents juggled four different inspectors, four invoices and four inboxes to close a single sale. We brought the best of each discipline together so you don't have to.
merger.lead2: One login, one point of contact and one delivery timeline — backed by the same certified experts you already trusted.

oneContact.body: A single account manager per office.
oneContact.label: One contact

oneDashboard.body: Track every assignment in real time.
oneDashboard.label: One dashboard

asbestos.description: Mandatory in Flanders since November 2022 for the sale of any residential property built before 2001. Issued by an OVAM-certified inspector after a non-destructive site inventory.
asbestos.title: Asbestos Inventory Attest

electrical.description: AREI/RGIE installation check covering the safety of the electrical system. Required at every residential sale and after major renovations of the installation.
electrical.title: Electrical Inspection
electrical.validity: 25 years if approved · 18 months to remediate if not

epc.description: Energy-performance rating shown on the property listing. The certificate displays the energy class (A → G) and must be available before the property is advertised for sale or rent.
epc.title: Energy Performance Certificate
epc.whenNeeded: Before advertising a sale or rental

fuel.description: Periodic inspection of residential heating-oil tanks, above-ground or buried. The certificate confirms the tank meets regional regulations and may continue to be used.
fuel.title: Fuel Tank Check
fuel.whenNeeded: Periodic — frequency depends on tank type

photos.description: Wide-angle, professionally-lit listing photography for sales and rentals. Edited and delivered the same day so your listing goes live without a wait.
photos.title: Property Photography

signage.description: We deliver and mount For-Sale or For-Rent signage at the property, branded with your agency. Pickup and removal handled when the listing closes.
signage.title: On-site Signage

services.heading: Every certificate a property needs, under one roof.
services.lead: Pick one service or bundle all four on the same assignment. One invoice, one point of contact, one dashboard.
